# awscc_wellarchitected_lens (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::WellArchitected::Lens



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the lens.
- `json_string` (String) The JSON representation of a lens.
- `lens_arn` (String) The ARN of the lens.
- `lens_id` (String) The unique identifier of the lens.
- `lens_version` (String) The version of the lens.
- `name` (String) The full name of the lens.
- `owner` (String) The Amazon Web Services account ID that owns the lens.
- `tags` (Attributes List) The tags assigned to the lens. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String)
- `value` (String)
